case_title: ZHUO SHENG GUAN VS. NORMA J LEE

docket_entries.description: EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED NOV-02-2015 ORDERED DESTROYED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-15-2015 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GUAN, ZHUO SHENG IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT LEE, NORMA J STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,978.37 FILED BY GUAN, ZHUO SHENG AS TO DEFENDANT LEE, NORMA J ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-15-2015 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 40.00 - SERVED JUN-08-2015, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT LEE, NORMA J

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-15-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-15-2015 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: QUEENA HO. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ASSISTED BY COURT CERTIFIED CANTONESE INTERPRETER BANNIE CHOW. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT. DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
